stemHtml: A four-engine aeroplane has an engine failure just after take-off at the maximum take-off thrust setting. The resulting moment around the normal axis will be greatest when an...

options.a: inboard engine fails and the airport is at high altitude.
options.b: outboard engine fails and the airport is at high altitude.
options.c: outboard engine fails and the airport is at low altitude.
options.d: inboard engine fails and the airport is at low altitude.
